exam_name: CPA Program: Global Strategy and Leadership
exam_format: Online, open book, 3-hour computer-based exam with scenario-based questions

testing_centers.notes: CPA Program exams are delivered online and proctored remotely. Candidates sit exams from home or a quiet, secure location. Exams are offered in multiple windows throughout the year.

id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID required. Name must match CPA Australia membership registration.
exam_rules: Online computer-based exam, 3 hours. Open book — CPA Australia learning materials may be accessed during the exam. Internet browsing beyond the permitted CPA materials is not allowed. Remote proctor monitors via webcam throughout the examination.
renewal_options: CPA designation requires 3 years of relevant work experience for conferral. Ongoing: CPA Australia members must complete 40 hours of CPD annually (20 hours verifiable) to maintain CPA designation. Annual membership renewal required.

prerequisites.description: Must be enrolled as a CPA Australia candidate and have completed foundation requirements.

retake_policy.notes: Candidates who fail may re-enrol in the segment and resit. Full segment fee applies for re-enrolment. No limit on the number of attempts per segment.

official_study_resources.title: CPA Program Learning Materials (online)
official_study_resources.notes: Official CPA Program study materials, practice exams, and question banks accessible through the CPA Australia online learning portal.

aliases: cpa program global strategy and leadership
